message:
refactor(common): migrate tests to TestLogger pattern

Updates verification result tests to use the TestLogger utility for
consistent, structured test logging:

- Replaces manual init_test_logging() + info!() calls with TestLogger
- Uses TestPhase enum (Execute, Verify) for semantic phase markers
- Uses log_with_data() for structured JSON logging of values
- Adds logger.pass() for explicit success markers

This improves test output readability and makes test progress easier
to follow in CI/verbose logging modes. The TestLogger provides:
- Automatic test name tracking
- Phase-based organization
- JSON-structured data attachments
- Consistent formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
